basic_details.job_title: ITI Mahasamund Surveyor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Industrial Training Institute Mahasamund (ITI Mahasamund) Surveyor Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website https://mahasamund.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ITI Mahasamund Surveyor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: High School or equivalent from recognized board, NTC/NAC from NCVT/SCVT or Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering
qualification.details: Surveyor: High School or equivalent from recognized board and NTC/NAC from NCVT/SCVT or Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering from recognized university/board.

selection_process: Merit List based on marks in technical qualification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://mahasamund.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ITI Mahasamund Surveyor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ITI Mahasamund Surveyor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the ITI Mahasamund Surveyor recruitment is 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Surveyor post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Surveyor post, candidates must have completed High School or equivalent from a recognized board and possess an NTC/NAC from NCVT/SCVT or a Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/board.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Surveyor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Surveyor post in the Industrial Training Institute Mahasamund recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Surveyor position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Surveyor position is Rs. 140 - 15000 Per Month, with a maximum of Rs. 15000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Surveyor post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Surveyor post will be based on a Merit List prepared from the marks obtained in the technical qualification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Industrial Training Institute Mahasamund, which is https://mahasamund.nic.in/.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Mahasamund, Chhattisgarh, with a pincode of 493445.
